features.name: SmartBoard System
features.description: A comprehensive interactive whiteboard with drawing tools, shapes, laser pointer, and infinite canvas capabilities.

features.name: Toolbars & Panels
features.description: Context-aware toolbars for managing pen settings, shapes, laser options, and styling.

features.name: Question Management & PDF Studio
features.description: Features for displaying questions, generating PDFs, and managing question sets.

features.name: Views (Teacher/Student)
features.description: Role-specific views for presenting and interacting with content.
